overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a character walking through a neon-lit bar interior with teal and magenta lighting, then exiting into a futuristic outdoor plaza at night. The scene features wet reflective surfaces, glowing floor panels, and cyberpunk architecture with holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk bar interior with neon accent lighting

agents.ego_description: walking through the neon-lit bar interior along the counter, passing patrons and bar staff

notable_agents.action: bartender in blue shirt working behind the main counter
patron in white hat walking ahead toward the back of the bar

entered.detail: long dark bar counter with bottles and glasses illuminated by teal lighting
glowing cyan light strips running along the floor edges
circular neon sign with pink and green lettering on the wall
illuminated menu displays mounted behind the bar
decorative doorway with angular teal neon lighting at the far end of the bar

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow cyberpunk bar interior bathed in teal and magenta neon light. The main bar counter runs along the right side with a bartender working behind it, while glowing floor strips guide the path forward. Patrons stand and sit scattered throughout the space, and a geometric neon archway marks the distant exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: bar interior transition area near exit doorway

agents.ego_description: continuing through the back section of the bar toward the illuminated exit doorway

notable_agents.action: patron sitting at a high-top table near the wall

entered.detail: circular standing tables with stools along the left wall
large opening leading to the brightly lit outdoor plaza

segments.scene_description: Moving toward the rear of the bar, the character passes high-top tables and approaches a geometric neon archway that frames the exit. The main bar counter recedes behind as the bright outdoor plaza becomes visible through the doorway ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic outdoor dining plaza with illuminated walkways

events.description: exits the bar into the open-air plaza with glowing floor panels and city views
turns left toward the Avante storefront while exploring the plaza perimeter

agents.ego_description: exploring the outdoor plaza, walking past illuminated seating areas and turning to examine storefronts

notable_agents.action: patron sitting at an outdoor booth under the large central tree

entered.detail: large illuminated rectangular tiles embedded in the pavement emitting bright white light
large mature tree with thick trunk situated in the center of the plaza
futuristic white seating pods with glowing bases arranged around the tree
high-end clothing boutique with illuminated signage and mannequins visible through glass
floating digital billboards and neon signs on surrounding building facades

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the bar, the scene opens into a vast outdoor plaza at night featuring glowing floor panels and a large central tree surrounded by futuristic seating booths. The character explores the wet reflective surfaces, passing patrons seated at outdoor tables, and turns toward the illuminated Avante storefront while holographic advertisements glow on the surrounding cyberpunk towers.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the intimate, neon-drenched interior of a cyberpunk bar into a vast, illuminated outdoor plaza. It begins by gliding through a narrow space bathed in teal and magenta light, passing a long bar counter and scattered patrons guided by glowing floor strips. As the camera moves toward the rear of the establishment, the interior details recede and the view narrows toward a geometric neon archway that frames the exit. The scene then opens abruptly into the night air, shifting from the enclosed bar to a wide plaza featuring wet reflective surfaces and a large central tree surrounded by futuristic seating. Finally, the camera explores the open square, passing outdoor tables and holographic advertisements before turning toward the glowing storefront of an Avante shop.
